title: Photorealistic Editorial Street Style Portrait Young Red
sourceTitle: Photorealistic Editorial Street Style Portrait Young Red
prompt: Photorealistic editorial street-style portrait of a young red-haired woman crouching outside a neighborhood fruit market in warm afternoon sunlight, sipping a bright red smoothie through a straw. She has long copper hair with bangs, subtle glam makeup, and wears a fitted glossy red crop top, black mini shorts, and black boots, with wired earphones connected to a vintage silver MP3 player clipped at her waist. Fresh fruit stands with oranges, pineapples, apples, and market storefront details in the background. A red designer-style handbag placed beside her. Realistic skin texture, candid fashion photography aesthetic, high detail, natural urban lighting.
